meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Ship Faster (Advanced)
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your MVP. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your workflow and turn stalled ideas into revenue-generating SaaS.
content.answer_block: The 'Antigravity' template solves project stagnation by enforcing a rigid, modular architecture that separates business logic from boilerplate. By pairing this with Claude Code's agentic capabilities, you convert high-level product requirements directly into functional, production-ready code, effectively eliminating the friction that keeps founders trapped in the ideation phase.
content.intro:
Your hard drive is a graveyard of half-finished repositories and abandoned 'next big things.' Every day you spend stuck in the weeds of boilerplate configuration is a day you aren't talking to users or collecting revenue. The graveyard isn't filled with bad ideas; it's filled with founders who lost momentum to technical friction.

The Antigravity template is your parachute. It is designed to strip away the overhead of modern full-stack development, providing a pre-validated, high-velocity skeleton that lets you focus exclusively on your value proposition. When combined with the autonomous nature of Claude Code, you move from 'trying to build' to 'managing the build' in seconds.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root architecture. This step ensures your project is pre-configured for deployment, authentication, and database connectivity, preventing 'blank page syndrome'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define the Business Domain Model
steps.description: Translate your core value proposition into a schema. This ensures the database reflects the business logic before you write a single UI component.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a subscription-based AI tool and generate the Prisma schema for User, Subscription, and UsageLog models.

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use agentic coding to build out the core feature set. We focus on the 'Money Path'—the specific flow that leads a user to a purchase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core AI-processing engine using the Antigravity service layer pattern, ensuring all error handling and API rate limiting are included.

steps.title: Integrate Production-Grade Auth
steps.description: Never roll your own auth. Configure the secure, pre-validated auth flow provided by the template to maintain compliance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the authentication middleware to enforce role-based access control (RBAC) across all protected API routes.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Transition from local dev to a live URL. Speed is the only metric that matters for an MVP.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment-ready configuration for Vercel and optimize the build pipeline for production performance.

pro_tips: Treat your schema as the single source of truth; if the data model doesn't support the feature, the feature isn't ready for code.
Use Claude Code to write your integration tests first; if the tests pass, your feature is effectively 'done' for an MVP.
Never modify the template's core orchestration layer; wrap your custom logic in 'sidecar' modules to maintain upgradeability.
Monitor your API latency during the build phase; early performance optimization prevents massive refactors post-launch.
Automate your feedback loop by connecting your staging environment directly to a beta testing Slack channel.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, implement a simple analytics dashboard to track conversion metrics, then pivot immediately to user acquisition to validate the product-market fit.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in isolation and start shipping products that people actually pay for. Our community of founders is waiting to help you scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
